label: Smart Car — Trip Logger
info:
Subscribes to smartcar/telemetry, stores raw rows in Postgres `telemetry`,
and on 90s of silence (trip ended) upserts a per-trip summary into `trips`.

name: build telemetry insert
build trip summary
func:
const tripId = flow.get('lastTripId');
if (!tripId) return null;
msg.query = `INSERT INTO trips (trip_id, started_at, ended_at, duration_s, distance_km, avg_speed, max_speed, avg_rpm, max_rpm, max_coolant, min_voltage, samples, fuel_used_l, l_per_100km, route, warmup_s, start_voltage, idle_fuel_lph)
SELECT trip_id, min(ts), max(ts), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (max(ts)-min(ts)))::int,
 COALESCE(SUM(speed*dt_h),0), avg(speed), max(speed), avg(rpm), max(rpm), max(coolant), min(voltage), count(*),
 COALESCE(SUM(fuel_rate*dt_h),0),
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(speed*dt_h),0) > 0.1 THEN COALESCE(SUM(fuel_rate*dt_h),0)/SUM(speed*dt_h)*100 ELSE NULL END,
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(speed*dt_h),0) >= 1 THEN '~' || (round(COALESCE(SUM(speed*dt_h),0)/2)*2)::int || ' km' ELSE 'short' END,
 EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (min(ts) FILTER (WHERE coolant >= 80) - min(ts)))::int,
 (array_agg(voltage ORDER BY ts))[1],
 avg(fuel_rate) FILTER (WHERE speed < 2 AND rpm BETWEEN 500 AND 1100)
FROM (SELECT trip_id, ts, speed, rpm, coolant, voltage, fuel_rate,
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts - LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY trip_id ORDER BY ts)))/3600.0 AS dt_h
      FROM telemetry WHERE trip_id = $1) q
GROUP BY trip_id
ON CONFLICT (trip_id) DO UPDATE SET ended_at=EXCLUDED.ended_at, duration_s=EXCLUDED.duration_s,
 distance_km=EXCLUDED.distance_km, avg_speed=EXCLUDED.avg_speed, max_speed=EXCLUDED.max_speed,
 avg_rpm=EXCLUDED.avg_rpm, max_rpm=EXCLUDED.max_rpm, max_coolant=EXCLUDED.max_coolant,
 min_voltage=EXCLUDED.min_voltage, samples=EXCLUDED.samples, fuel_used_l=EXCLUDED.fuel_used_l,
 l_per_100km=EXCLUDED.l_per_100km, route=COALESCE(trips.route, EXCLUDED.route),
 warmup_s=EXCLUDED.warmup_s, start_voltage=EXCLUDED.start_voltage, idle_fuel_lph=EXCLUDED.idle_fuel_lph`;
msg.params = [tripId];
return msg;
